notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Sal Stewart steals (11) 2nd base. Blake Dunn steals (6) 3rd base.

notableEvents.label: Eugenio Suárez grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Eugenio Suárez hits a grand slam (7) to center field. Edwin Arroyo scores. JJ Bleday scores. Sal Stewart scores.

notableEvents.label: Mark Vientos pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mark Vientos singles on a line drive to right fielder Noelvi Marte. Marcus Semien to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Eric Wagaman pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Eric Wagaman walks. Carson Benge to 3rd. Juan Soto to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Mark Vientos pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mark Vientos flies out to center fielder Blake Dunn.
